title: coap_dtn.c: OSCORE ctx lookup uses hardcoded ID 1 for confessions
description: P0 correctness: deaddrop_get assumes oscore_ctx with recipient ID 0x01 but spec requires per-peer or unified derivation from 06-security.md. Use oscore_ctx_get_by_eui64 or proper KID from OSCORE option. Cross refs project-LICHEN-86ur
